envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Static design substrate. Team plan: Standard + Professional Twin seats + Collaboration Pack candidate + basic workflow recommendations. Baseline DMW + safety + audit included.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Team plan unlocks Collaboration pack entitlement availability. Connector activation still requires Foundation governance + map-region approval + per-connector RULE 21 research arc per ADR-0084.

ledger.name: Team Entitlement Ledger Seed
ledger.human_readable_summary: $250 base + 2 admin + 5 standard + 5 professional twin seats baseline. Collaboration Pack candidate entitlement. Basic workflow recommendations. Baseline DMW + safety + audit included.
ledger.model_usage_notes: Team plan is the first tier where connector pack candidacy + workflow recommendations land at the entitlement layer.

usage_meters.included_allowance: 10 active standard + professional twin seats combined
100000 read events / month per activated connector

entitlement_check_examples.scenario: Admin activates a Slack ConnectorBinding at Team plan
entitlement_check_examples.governance_note: Collaboration Pack candidate entitlement at Team makes Slack available; Foundation governance + map-region approval per ADR-0082 Amendment 1 + per-connector RULE 21 research arc still required to authorize activation.

entitlement_check_examples.scenario: Admin tries to activate workflow Stage 4 governed execution at Team plan
entitlement_check_examples.governance_note: Team plan covers Stages 1-2 (template + recommendation) per ADR-0081. Stage 3+ requires Workflow Automation Pack entitlement at Business plan.

entitlement_check_examples.scenario: Connector pack entitlement at Team plan is interpreted as authorization
entitlement_check_examples.governance_note: AI_AGENT cannot autonomously activate connectors per GOVSEC.6 + ADR-0084. Entitlement makes availability; governance authorizes activation.

governance_review_points: Collaboration Pack entitlement makes Slack available; governance authorizes activation
Workflow recommendations are advisory; Stage 3+ execution requires Business plan entitlement + Foundation governance approval
Baseline DMW safety is never paywalled — included even at Team
Customers should not pay extra just to have memory be safe
audit_expectations: future ADMIN_ACTION:ENTITLEMENT_LEDGER_REFERENCED when consumed at B5+ runtime
